description: Style NoteFor the fiery and hot-tempered, here's a pair of sandals to match your temperament. In brown and black, lotto's Zeus floaters (inspired by the Greek God) look wonderful with jeans, bermudas or cargoes. Wear them with a bright tee.Product DetailsSoft straps with a twill tape toe separator, for abrasion-free comfort and to hold the foot in placePadded and dot-textured footbed that is curved ergonomically Grooved footbed for styleDurable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
